mapper.select:
SELECT NB.NOTICE_NO AS noticeNo, NB.CATEGORY AS category, NB.TITLE AS title, PU.USER_NAME AS writer, NB.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, NB.VIEW_COUNT AS views, ( SELECT NF.FILE_PATH || NF.CHANGE_NAME FROM NOTICE_FILE NF WHERE NF.NOTICE_NO = NB.NOTICE_NO AND NF.DELETED = 'N' ORDER BY NF.FILE_NO ASC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY ) AS thumbnailPath FROM NOTICE_BOARD NB JOIN PLOGUES_USER PU ON NB.USER_ID = PU.USER_ID WHERE NB.DELETED = 'N' AND NB.CATEGORY = #{category} ORDER BY NB.NOTICE_NO DESC
OFFSET #{pi.offset} ROWS
FETCH NEXT #{pi.boardLimit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NOTICE_BOARD WHERE DELETED = 'N' AND CATEGORY = #{category}

SELECT NB.NOTICE_NO AS noticeNo, NB.CATEGORY AS category, NB.TITLE AS title, PU.USER_NAME AS writer, NB.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, NB.CONTENT AS content, NB.UPDATED AS updated FROM NOTICE_BOARD NB JOIN PLOGUES_USER PU ON NB.USER_ID = PU.USER_ID WHERE NB.NOTICE_NO = #{noticeNo} AND NB.DELETED = 'N'

SELECT FILE_NO AS fileNo, ORIGIN_NAME AS originName, CHANGE_NAME AS changeName, FILE_PATH AS filePath, DELETED AS deleted, NOTICE_NO AS refBoardNo FROM NOTICE_FILE WHERE NOTICE_NO = #{noticeNo} AND DELETED = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTICE_BOARD SET TITLE = #{notice.title}, CONTENT = #{notice.content}, CATEGORY = #{notice.category}, UPDATED = 'Y' WHERE NOTICE_NO = #{notice.noticeNo} AND DELETED = 'N'
UPDATE NOTICE_BOARD SET VIEW_COUNT = VIEW_COUNT + 1 WHERE NOTICE_NO = #{noticeNo}
UPDATE NOTICE_BOARD SET DELETED = 'Y' WHERE NOTICE_NO = #{noticeNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTICE_BOARD ( NOTICE_NO, CATEGORY, TITLE, CONTENT, USER_ID ) VALUES ( SEQ_NOTICE_BOARD.NEXTVAL, #{notice.category}, #{notice.title}, #{notice.content}, #{notice.userId} )
